title: 3D Model Viewer
header_subtitle: Import FBX/VRM/PMX models, preview and play animations (drop/select textures together).
drop_zone_text:
Drag FBX / VRM / PMX here (you can include textures)
You can also drop VRMA .vrma (for VRM) or VMD .vmd (for PMX) animation files
drop_zone_hint: Supported: .fbx/.vrm/.pmx (one required), VRMA: .vrma (optional, VRM only), VMD: .vmd (optional, PMX only), textures (optional: .png/.jpg/.jpeg/.bmp/.tga, etc.)
error_no_module: Your browser doesn't support ES Modules. Use the latest Edge/Chrome.
msg_need_vrm_for_vrma: Load a VRM model (.vrm) before applying a .vrma animation.
msg_need_pmx_for_vmd: Load a PMX/PMD model before importing .vmd animations.
msg_vmd_failed_after_load: Loaded (VMD load failed; please check .vmd files)
msg_pmx_no_anim: Loaded (no animations found; PMX animations usually require .vmd)
msg_vmd_only_pmx: Detected .vmd, but VMD is only supported for PMX/PMD.
msg_vrma_only_vrm: Detected .vrma, but VRMA is only supported for VRM (.vrm).
error_vrma_missing_extension: This .vrma is missing the glTF extension VRMC_vrm_animation.
error_vrma_missing_animations: This .vrma does not include glTF animations.
error_vrma_bones_mismatch: The .vrma humanoid mapping doesn't match the current VRM (no retargetable bones).
viewer_hint: Left: rotate / Middle: pan / Wheel: zoom
msg_no_anim: Model loaded, but no animations found
